element_introduction_order.mastery_context: One-on-one fighting against progressively stronger foes
Health regeneration mechanic encourages defensive play if player waits out enemy attacks
Deflection with timed punches or kicks; distinct attack pattern requiring active response
Fatal obstacles requiring spatial awareness and timing; cannot be defeated through combat
Ultimate test of mastered combat mechanics; positioned as climactic difficulty spike
Unique conditional victory; teaches player that not all encounters require aggression

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating enemy and moving to next screen
typical_tension_triggers: Akuma's story presence indicated through cutscenes
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear progression punctuated by one-on-one combat encounters; cinematic storytelling breaks between fights create emotional pacing alongside mechanical challenges; intensity builds toward Akuma confrontation

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Upside-down disk insertion Easter egg (platform-specific, not level-design spatial grammar)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic one-on-one combat encounters; hero learns fundamental punch/kick mechanics against introductory foes
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of hawk enemies and environmental hazards; requires adaptation beyond pure combat; spatial awareness becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Akuma confrontation as skill-check; all prior mechanics must be mastered; final requirement to approach Mariko in non-fighting stance adds conditional logic twist
notable_spikes: First environmental hazard encounter (sudden death mechanic)
Akuma boss fight (ultimate mechanical and narrative climax)

notable_level_patterns.description: Hero walks/runs left-to-right through escalating challenges; structure mirrors narrative ascent into Akuma's stronghold; each screen presents one enemy encounter or environmental obstacle
Each enemy encounter occupies single screen; full focus on isolated duel; health bars displayed for both combatants; encourages reading opponent patterns before committing to attacks

Narrative cutscenes interspersed between combat showing Akuma's orders, Mariko's anxiety, and story progression; breaks mechanical tension with emotional/dramatic tension; establishes motivation for continued progression
